Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to produce a BPMN like textual process model based on interview excerpts

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The task Using the information from the interviews generate a BPMN like process diagram description in textual form that captures Activities Tasks Sequence Flow Gateways Decision Points Roles Participants Artifacts Inputs Outputs Exceptions Variations

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Also Consolidate conflicting accounts by indicating uncertainty where necessary The output must be a well structured textual representation that can be used to draw a BPMN diagram

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to incorporate all details start Invoice receipt Steps check PO if no PO then request from supplier else log invoice Then forward to purchasing for confirmation Then match invoice line items to PO If matches send to manager for approval If discrepancy email purchasing for clarification escalate to supervisor if unresolved Manager approval triggers after confirmation and match they get notification Manager approves rejects Then after manager approval schedule for payment payment run

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Also other roles Supplier Relationship Manager is looped in for missing PO pricing discrepancy contract terms She helps resolve issues

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to capture loops escalations Need to have decisions check PO existence yes no Decision matched Yes manager approval no clarify dispute Decision manager approves Yes schedule payment no investigate or reject

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We also have alternative path If missing PO send back to supplier request details This could be considered an exception request PO from supplier then re enter Or if discrepancy cannot be resolved easily escalate to supervisor Also supplier may be contacted via Supplier Relationship Manager We need to include that

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to represent roles Accounts Payable Clerk Mary Purchasing Officer Dan Department Manager Carlos Accounts Payable Supervisor Rita Supplier Relationship Manager Karen Also system accounting system maybe as automated tasks

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Artifacts Invoice Purchase Order PO email notifications confirmation email system notifications payment schedule

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to produce a textual BPMN like description maybe something like Process Invoice Approval Process Start Event Invoice Received by email End Event Payment Scheduled

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Flow Receive Invoice AP Clerk Input Invoice email Output Logged Invoice in System Check PO Existence Decision Gateway If PO missing Task Request PO from Supplier If PO present Proceed Request PO from Supplier AP Clerk contacts Supplier Output Supplier provides PO or revised invoice After receiving PO loop back to step one

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Log Invoice in Accounting System AP Clerk Output Logged Invoice record Forward Invoice to Purchasing for Goods Receipt Confirmation AP Clerk Purchasing Output Confirmation request Purchasing Officer Dan Reviews PO and Invoice Decision Does invoice match PO If match Send Confirmation If mismatch Request clarification or correction

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If mismatch email AP clerk or purchasing to clarify If unresolved escalate to Supervisor Rita

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After confirmation from Purchasing AP Clerk matches Invoice Line Items to PO Task Match Invoice to PO Decision Match If yes proceed to Manager Approval If no Resolve Discrepancy including contacting Supplier Relationship Manager or escalation to Rita After resolution loop back to Match Invoice to PO

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Send to Department Manager for Approval Task Manager receives notification Decision Approve If yes proceed to schedule payment If no Investigate maybe request further info or reject Rejection loops to resolution

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After Manager approval AP Clerk schedules invoice for payment Task Schedule Payment Then End

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Also includes roles for Supplier Relationship Manager in case of missing PO or pricing discrepancy she is involved to contact supplier and verify contract terms So there can be a Resolve Discrepancy with Supplier task where either AP clerk or Purchasing Officer or Supplier Relationship Manager may be engaged

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We also need to note any ambiguous or conflicting accounts Mary says If there is a discrepancy like incorrect pricing or missing items I email the purchasing team to clarify Sometimes if the discrepancy cannot be resolved easily I have to escalate it to my supervisor Dan says If something is off we either contact the supplier directly or ask the Accounts Payable clerk to hold the invoice So there is some variation sometimes Purchasing contacts supplier directly sometimes AP clerk contacts We can note that as ambiguous

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: If PO number missing I tell Mary she needs to get that information before I can proceed So that is also a path

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Also the managers approval triggered after both receipt and match system sends an automatic email That is an automated task

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Now produce a textual BPMN model with sections Process Summary Roles Artifacts Activities with sequence Gateways decision points Exceptions Variations
